title: campe orthoceras var. dolichocarpa
intro: Campe orthoceras var. dolichocarpa, also known as Orthocarpus, is a flowering plant belonging to the broomrape family, Orobanchaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its antispasmodic and antiseptic properties, which can help to alleviate cramps and pain, as well as prevent infections. The health benefits of Campe orthoceras var. dolichocarpa include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use and efficacy may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual needs.
